description: It's femininty celebrated and enhanced with this pair of slippers from Inc. 5. With it's sleek design and simple style, this pair works great with office and party wear. This pair comes with a shoe bag that helps you carry it around in ease. Upper Ergonomically padded and curved leather footbed with a padded patch under the heel for absolute comfort and style Midfoot strap with a big toe holder to hold the foot in place in style Outsole Durable PU outsole with floral grooves on the forefoot and heel for ultimate grip even on smooth surfaces Sandal care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Remove dust from fabric using a soft bristled brush Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
